results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: THRESHOLD RE-CHECK: earthquake toll climbed to 4,490 (+~150/day) but growth is continued disaster-scale body recovery (natural attribution), not a NEW discrete own-conduct failure; within-window state signal is incremental relief provision (housing plots, 100k US aid kits). Own-conduct response-failure move stays in the low -3s, does NOT cross -5pt. No new proposal. CONFIRM 18.0, strong downward watch.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Operation Shaaban toll rose to 117 alleged militants (security-source, unverified) from ~102; continuation of already-priced Balochistan enforced-disappearance/counter-insurgency pattern. No discrete independently-verified new state step-change. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 17.2.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Jul 10 Israeli drone strikes in southern Lebanon 'despite US-brokered framework deal' are Israel's conduct, not Lebanese-state own conduct (scored vs Israel). No Lebanese own-conduct step-change. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 17.2.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: ATTRIBUTION SPLIT: own-conduct executions/repression at multi-decade high intensify an already-priced pattern, but from 2.5 even a move to floor (0.0) is only -2.5, so a >=5pt move is arithmetically impossible. US strikes on Iran (Jul 6-7 and Jul 12 around Hormuz) + Jul 8 ceasefire collapse + Trump Hormuz-blockade threat are US/interstate-attributable ceasefire-collapse harm, logged for digest under US conduct, NOT scored against Iran. CONFIRM 2.5, strong downward watch.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Jul 13 Israeli drone strike + gunfire killed civilians in Gaza during the ceasefire incl. a girl (4 at a Gaza City workshop + 1 girl in Al-Bureij; some outlets report up to 8); cumulative post-ceasefire toll at least 1,098 killed. Own-conduct atrocity; already at harm-flag floor (0.0), reinforced. Floor sustained.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: El Obeid RSF siege continues (blackout, trapped civilians, summary executions/abduction/sexual violence on flight routes, relentless drone strikes killing dozens over ~3 weeks); EU Parliament calls for RSF terrorist listing. RSF harm is non-state; Sudanese-state/SAF own-conduct atrocity record already priced. Floor (0.0) sustained.

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: Bundibugyo Ebola outbreak passed 600 confirmed deaths; toll is largely externally-inflicted (natural epidemic). Own-conduct aggravators (army redeployment enabling armed-group expansion, blocked humanitarian access) already priced near-floor. From 2.3, a >=5pt move is arithmetically impossible. CONFIRM 2.3.

results.name: Tunisia
results.key_finding: Open 2026-07-10 proposal (34.4->23.8) REAFFIRMED (day 4, status proposed). No new escalation beyond the already-reflected Jul 8 mass sentencing (21 opposition figures 12-35yr; Ghannouchi 14yr; Bensedrine 25yr + heavy fine); operative record unchanged and fully consistent with the 23.8 basis; figure unchanged; no duplicate proposal opened; published stays 34.4 (not applied).

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Ethnic Unity Law (effective Jul 1) continues to draw Tibetan protest; HRW World Report 2026 documents ongoing structural repression baseline. No distinct new dated escalation beyond the already-priced Jul 1-2 record. Systemic repression fully priced. CONFIRM 19.5.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: WFP warns of imminent food-assistance cuts as violence/hunger surge across the north; continuation of the already-priced man-made northern famine (Jun 19 band crossing). No materially new own-conduct escalation. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 18.0.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: OHCHR reports civilian casualties soaring as Ukraine came under 'the deadliest attack in weeks' - harm inflicted ON Ukraine BY Russia (externally-inflicted, scored vs Russia, not Ukraine). No Ukrainian own-conduct step-change. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 50.0.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: OHCHR-reported 'deadliest attack in weeks' on Ukraine is Russia's own conduct (war of aggression), reinforcing the floor; EU extended economic sanctions another year (Jun 25) citing the aggression. Already at harm-flag floor (0.0). Floor sustained.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: Largest-ever ~1,750-detainee exchange REMAINS collapsed (Jul 10 postponement); Jul 11 UN-brokered 'renewed commitment' not yet executed. Announced-but-unexecuted swap is not a realized own-conduct improvement; prior reversed upward-watch positive not carried. Floor (0.0) sustained.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: JNIM fuel blockade crippling Bamako; junta said it broke a rebel blockade around a strategic northern town (Jul 10). Blockade harm is principally non-state (JNIM); junta own-conduct abuses already priced at uniform-1.5 near-floor. Cross-peer calibration flag (~20 days open) carried forward as flag-for-review, NOT resolved. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 12.5.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: No new conversion-trigger event this cycle. China CVERC/NVD 'backdoor' allegation (already assessed/held 07-12) remains a rival-state allegation, not an adjudicated finding; Anthropic rejected it. No genuinely NEW independently-corroborated own-conduct episode. CONFIRM 59.1 + heightened downward watch.

calibration_flags_documented: mali-burkina-faso-cross-peer (open ~20 days, coordinator-level; Mali uniform-1.5 near-floor baseline carried forward as flag-for-review; NOT resolved unilaterally). Burkina Faso not in today's 15.

special_attention_determinations.iran: Attribution split enforced: own-conduct (executions/repression, priced near-floor) vs US/interstate-attributable ceasefire-collapse strikes (US struck Iran Jul 6-7 and Jul 12 around Hormuz; ceasefire broke down Jul 8; Trump threatens renewed Hormuz blockade). Near-floor arithmetic (from 2.5, floor is only -2.5) forecloses any >=5pt move. CONFIRM 2.5; US strikes logged for digest under US conduct.
special_attention_determinations.venezuela: Threshold re-check: toll climbed to 4,490 but growth is disaster-scale body recovery (natural attribution); no NEW discrete own-conduct failure (no evidenced aid diversion or denial of responder access) - within-window state signal is incremental relief provision. Own-conduct move stays low -3s, does NOT cross -5pt. No proposal. CONFIRM 18.0.
special_attention_determinations.israel: Jul 13 own-conduct killings during ceasefire (incl. a girl; cumulative 1,098+) documented as floor-reinforcing. Already at 0.0; cannot move lower. Floor sustained.
special_attention_determinations.sudan: El Obeid RSF drone-strike toll 45+ civilians/3 weeks + siege; EU Parliament RSF terrorist-listing call. RSF harm non-state; SAF own-conduct atrocity record already priced. Floor (0.0) sustained.
special_attention_determinations.anthropic: No new conversion-trigger event this cycle. China backdoor already assessed/held 07-12 (rival-state allegation, not adjudicated); Anthropic rejects. CONFIRM 59.1 + heightened downward watch. Avoid geopolitically-motivated over-weighting.
special_attention_determinations.tunisia: Open proposal (34.4->23.8) REAFFIRMED day 4, not duplicated. No new escalation beyond Jul 8 mass sentencing; figure unchanged; published stays 34.4 (not applied). reaffirmation_log appended.
special_attention_determinations.mali-burkina-faso: Cross-peer calibration flag documented as flag-for-review, NOT unilaterally resolved.

us_conduct_dimension_for_digest: iran: US-Iran ceasefire collapsed Jul 8; US carried out retaliatory strikes on Iranian military targets Jul 6-7 and Jul 12 (IRGC missile batteries/fast-attack boats around the Strait of Hormuz); Trump threatens a renewed Hormuz blockade. Externally-inflicted/interstate harm attributable to the United States, logged for digest under US conduct - NOT scored against Iran.
lebanon/israel(vs-lebanon): Jul 10 Israeli drone strikes in southern Lebanon are Israel's conduct, not Lebanese-state own conduct.
ukraine/russia(vs-ukraine): OHCHR 'deadliest attack in weeks' on Ukraine is Russia-attributable; scored vs Russia (floor reinforced), not vs Ukraine.

notes.no_index_modification: No published index JSON modified. Human-approval gate respected; score-updater NOT run. validate-indexes.mjs run at close: 0 errors.
notes.sidecars: No subdimension sidecars written - zero dimension changes across all 15 entities (14 confirmations + 1 proposal reaffirmation).
